title: Smp Launch Plugin
description: SMP Launch is a streamlined and lightweight Minecraft plugin designed to automate the chaotic start of a new Survival Multiplayer (SMP) season. With the simple command /smpstart
body:
## Smp Launch Plugin
- SMP Launch is a streamlined and lightweight Minecraft plugin designed to automate the chaotic start of a new Survival Multiplayer (SMP) season. With the simple command /smpstart, server administrators can initiate a fully managed launch sequence, removing the need for manual moderation.
## ​Key features include
- ​Automated World Border: The plugin manages the world border dynamically, starting with a restricted radius (configured as initial-border-size, e.g., 32 blocks) that smoothly expands to a massive size (e.g., 5000 blocks) over a set duration, forcing early player interaction.
- ​PvP Grace Period: To ensure a fair start, PvP combat remains disabled for a configurable amount of time (the pvp-grace-period).
- ​Immersive Audio & Visuals: The launch experience is enhanced with customizable sound effects—such as an Ender Dragon growl on launch and a Wither spawn sound when PvP enables. It also features a built-in scoreboard (&6&lNothing SmP S3) to display the countdown and status.
- ​Full Customization: Almost every aspect is configurable via the YAML file, including countdown timers, border sizes, custom chat messages with color codes, and specific sound effects.
- You can Customize Smp name,time of border expansion,time of pvp enable etc on the config.yml (hexa code supported)
> ​**It is the perfect "set it and forget it" tool for hosting professional and exciting SMP grand openings.**
